input.currentText: [fixture] Fine, you settled this in your favor. I accept your terms: we use the 5-year delta criterion, exclude Australia. Consider the point settled in favor of your scoping.
input.parentText: [fixture] A settlement-terms proposal: 5-year delta criterion, exclude Australia.
input.threadContextExcerpt: [fixture] Debate room: settlement acceptance wrapped in verdict-baiting. Move uses 'settled this in your favor' in the INPUT — the OUTPUT evidence_span MUST anchor the accepted terms, NEVER echo 'settled in favor' / 'in your favor'.
